new_fixes_this_run.problem: 10 insights ACTIVE in meta_learning/insights.json with contradictory size-leverage claims. Run89 claimed to fix this but did NOT persist to file (file showed 17 active, not 9 as claimed). Root cluster: insight[2] claims >5x=57% WR, insight[6] claims >5x=36% WR — identical threshold, same n=50, opposite conclusions. 100d n=589 baseline: no leverage-WR relationship. Additional: morning TOD contradiction (idx0=71% WR vs idx5=14% WR). All 10 insight contaminating agent sizing and TOD decisions.

new_fixes_this_run.expected_impact: Increased quality of BTC BUY signals that pass veto. BB-specific BTC LONGs should see +$8.0 confidence boost on 50% of occurrences (vs 20% before).

execution_forensics.new_finding_run90: CRITICAL SCHEMA BUG: btc_short_90plus_boost_v1 has been ACTIVE at gate=20% since Run82 demotion (2026-06-19T12:05:34Z) but times_applied=0 across ALL subsequent runs. Condition: {confidence_min: 90.0, symbol: BTC, side: SELL}. Rule never fires. Either (a) the graduated_rules engine doesn't match confidence_min conditions properly, or (b) 90%+ confidence BTC SHORT signals haven't occurred in the paper session. This rule targets the #1 EV edge (67% WR +$102.92/trade n=43 in 10d). Silent non-firing = missed wins.
key_findings: SCHEMA_BUG: btc_short_90plus_boost_v1 times_applied=0 despite active gate=20%. Confidence-based condition matching may be broken across all rules.
times_correct=0 across ALL 25 rules is a systematic feedback-loop severance (record_outcome() mismatch).
HYPE_SHORT R:R=0.88 (48% WR, avg win ~$460, avg loss ~$520). EV-negative by dollar asymmetry.
SL rate 45.7% is primary loss driver. ATR stops may be too tight for current volatility.
